scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 488 Not acceptable here [last_From:] To: sip:81002001@rwtrunk.com;tag=11002 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INVITE [last_Via:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
